title: IntakeRawPayload
description: Raw Google Sheets payload as emitted by AppScript. Consumed by the ETL worker.

form_response_id.description: Unique ID assigned by the form/AppScript at submission time.

sheet_row_number.description: Row number in the Google Sheet for traceability.

SheetRow.title: SheetRow
SheetRow.description: Raw column values from the Google Sheet. Required fields must be non-empty for a standard new request. Extension requests may omit lab-configuration fields.

request_id.description: Same as form_response_id — duplicated in the row for traceability.

email.description: Submitter email (audit only — not stored in labs table).

status.description: Sheet-managed status (e.g. 'Submitted'). Not stored — workers manage their own state.

evaluated_on.description: Timestamp when AppScript last evaluated this row. Not stored.

primary_contact_name.description: Full name of the primary contact. Split into first/last by ETL.

secondary_contact_name.description: Full name of the secondary contact. Split into first/last by ETL.

lease.description: Requested lease duration (e.g. '3 weeks (15 working days)', '1 month (20 working days)').

timezone.description: Requestor timezone. Mapped to the region field in the labs table.

is_extension.description: Indicates whether this is a new lab request or an extension.

project_name.description: Short project identifier used to derive cluster_name.

openshift_version.description: Requested OpenShift version (required for new requests, may be empty for extensions).

description.description: Free-text description of the use case. Scanned for complexity keywords.

statement_of_work.description: Optional SOW reference. Stored in extras JSONB.

application_type.description: Application type. Stored in extras JSONB.

deployment_option.description: Deployment option. Stored in extras JSONB.

virt_size.description: Virtualization cluster size. Standard values: '', 'Standard'. Stored in extras JSONB.

ai_deployment_option.description: AI/ML deployment option. Stored in extras JSONB.

ai_size.description: AI/ML cluster size. Stored in extras JSONB.

gpu_required.description: GPU requirements. Non-empty triggers non-standard flag. Stored in extras JSONB.

note.description: Requestor notes. Substantial content (>10 chars) triggers non-standard flag. Stored as notes in labs table.

extension_challenges.description: For extension requests: description of current challenges. Stored in extras JSONB.

extension_objectives.description: For extension requests: objectives for the extended period. Stored in extras JSONB.
